mapper.sql: select e.event_id, e.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, a.asset_status, e.event_type, e.source_order_id, e.source_order_type, case when e.source_order_type = 'INVENTORY_TASK' then t.task_no else o.order_no end as source_order_no, e.before_snapshot, e.after_snapshot, e.event_desc, e.operator_user_id, coalesce(operator_user.nick_name, operator_user.user_name) as operator_user_name, e.operate_time from asset_event_log e left join asset_info a on a.asset_id = e.asset_id left join sys_dept scope_dept on scope_dept.dept_id = a.use_org_dept_id left join sys_user scope_user on scope_user.user_id = a.current_user_id left join sys_user operator_user on operator_user.user_id = e.operator_user_id left join asset_operate_order o on o.order_id = e.source_order_id and (e.source_order_type is null or e.source_order_type <> 'INVENTORY_TASK') left join asset_inventory_task t on t.task_id = e.source_order_id and e.source_order_type = 'INVENTORY_TASK'
